case_title: HADDAD, LISA DIANE VS PORTAS-HERNANDEZ, GONZALO ALBERTO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,442.20 FILED BY HADDAD, LISA DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT PORTAS-HERNANDEZ, GONZALO ALBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-27-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-15-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $4468.00. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND HEARING SENT TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED TO COURT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HADDAD, LISA DIANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PORTAS-HERNANDEZ, GONZALO ALBERTO $4,018.20 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,070.20, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR AND DID NOT FOLLOW THROUGH WITH THE TERMS OF THE MEDIATED AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF ACKNOWLEDGES RECEIPT OF $450.00 ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
